title: pilosella mnooclada
side_effects: Pilosella mnooclada can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, due to its high saponin content. Prolonged consumption of the plant can lead to liver damage and kidney problems, potentially causing jaundice and electrolyte imbalances. In severe cases, Pilosella mnooclada can cause allergic reactions, including skin rashes, itching, and anaphylaxis. Misuse of the plant can also interact with certain medications, such as blood thinners and diabetes medications, resulting in adverse health effects.
